title: Mandatory Repatriation of Underage Overseas Filipino Seafarer. Upon
content: 55 receipt of verifiable information on the presence of a seafarer whose actual age falls below 56 the minimum age requirement for overseas deployment, the shipowners/employers and 57 the LMA shall, without delay, repatriate the underage seafarer and report the incident to 58 the DFA and the DMW through the fastest means of communication available of such 59 information. 60 61 56 Failure to repatriate and/or report under this section shall constitute gross violation of 1 these Rules with the corresponding penalty. 2 3

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
